headline: The AI chatbot that turns visitors into customers
subheadline: Deploy a smart assistant in minutes. Train it on your docs, connect it to your site, and let it handle support, sales, and onboarding around the clock.

features.title: Train on your knowledge
features.body: Upload docs, FAQs, and product pages. FlowBot learns your tone and answers with context — not generic scripts.

features.title: Deploy anywhere
features.body: Embed on your site, connect Slack, or use our API. One bot, every channel your customers already use.

features.title: Insights that convert
features.body: See what people ask, where they drop off, and which conversations lead to sign-ups — all in one dashboard.

pricing.name: Starter
pricing.description: For solo founders and small teams getting started.

pricing.name: Pro
pricing.description: For growing teams that need scale and integrations.

pricing.name: Enterprise
pricing.description: For large orgs with security and SLA requirements.
